description: Discovered while verifying fz-go4.13.1 with cargo test --workspace. src/compiler2/drive_test.rs:2781 currently fails: compiler2::drive_test::compiler2_abi_ready_does_not_publish_unused_callable_constructors. The failing invariant is pre-codegen: ABI-ready programs should not materialize callable_entries for closure bodies unless a call or escape site demands them. This is structurally unrelated to fz-go4.13.1 because the assertion inspects abi_ready.last(root_id).program before native codegen/runtime helpers run. Capture and fix the demand/publication leak in compiler2 artifact planning.
title: Compiler2 ABI-ready artifact publishes unused callable-entry inventory
